name: Health APIs (33 entries)
applicability: SoNash is a recovery notebook app. Health APIs could power wellness tracking features. Key no-auth APIs: Covid tracking (multiple), CMS.gov Medicare data, Healthcare.gov, NPPES (provider lookup). Most are Covid-focused (aging) but the category itself is the right domain.
home_connection: SoNash Health/Wellness feature integration. Recovery-relevant health data.

name: Calendar APIs (18 entries)
applicability: Sobriety tracking is calendar-adjacent. Google Calendar (OAuth), Calendarific (holidays API), Nager.Date (public holidays). Could power 'milestones on holidays' or 'sobriety counter relative to events' features.

name: Weather APIs (33 entries)
applicability: Mood tracking + weather correlation is a common recovery feature. 7Timer (no auth), Open-Meteo (no auth, CORS yes), Visual Crossing (apiKey). Could power 'how does weather affect my mood/sobriety' journaling prompts.

name: Text Analysis APIs (17 entries)
applicability: Journal entry analysis — sentiment tracking, language detection, keyword extraction. Google Cloud Natural Language (apiKey), Aylien (apiKey), Detect Language (apiKey). Could analyze journal entries for emotional patterns over time.

name: Google Calendar API
applicability: OAuth. SoNash uses Firebase Auth which supports Google OAuth. Calendar integration for sobriety milestones, meeting reminders, daily check-in scheduling. Most mature calendar API.
home_connection: Direct integration candidate for SoNash calendar features.

name: Open-Meteo Weather API
applicability: No auth required, CORS yes. Free weather data API. Perfect for prototype integration — no API key friction. Weather-mood correlation journaling.
home_connection: Zero-friction weather data for mood correlation features.

name: Google Cloud Natural Language
applicability: apiKey auth. Sentiment analysis, entity recognition, syntax analysis. Could analyze journal entries for emotional patterns. Already in Firebase ecosystem (Google Cloud).
home_connection: Journal sentiment analysis. Same cloud ecosystem as Firebase.

name: validate_links.yml workflow
applicability: Daily cron link validation. 29 lines. Python 3.8 + custom links.py. Directly transferable pattern for checking docs/*, SKILL_INDEX.md, EXTRACTIONS.md, MEMORY.md for rotting URLs.
home_connection: Documentation link integrity. Currently no link checking in sonash.

name: PR template quality checklist
applicability: 10-item PR checklist. You have code-reviewer agent instead. The checklist approach is simpler but less enforceable.
home_connection: Alternative to agent-based PR review for lightweight checks.

name: links.py link validator
applicability: 273 lines. URL extraction via regex, duplicate detection, HTTP HEAD validation with randomized user agents. The -odlc quick-check flag is good UX. Transferable to Node/JS.
home_connection: Port pattern for docs link checking. Python → Node conversion needed.
